title: Spy Trap
overview: Spy Trap is a British television drama programme created by Robert Barr for BBC One. A team of spies at espionage agency 'The Department' are responsible for protecting national security. Reporting to the Department of Defense, no-nonsense Commander Paul Ryan uses intel discovered by his agents, to question suspects.
creator: Robert Barr

episodes.title: Spy Trap : TV Espionage Series : 4 Episodes
